title: Mernip
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mernips''' were [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[biot]]s. They were grown in pools.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1stm}}
